JUDGE D BALLATI; RPTR S LEE; CLK C CARSWELL 09:30AM CASE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. NEITHER DEFT JOSE BERMUDEZ NOR DEFT PETRONILA MARTINEZ HAVE APPEARED. AND THE COURT NOTES THAT NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL WAS SERVED TIMELY ON DEFT JOSE BERMUDEZ, ALTHOUGH NOT ON DEFT PETRONILA MARTINEZ. PLTF WINN IS PRESENT W ATNY STEVEN MACDONALD WHO SUBST'D IN TODAY. PLTF WITNESS BRIGHT WINN IS SWORN AND EXAMINED BY PLTF ATNY. PLTF EXH #1 3-DAY NOTICE, IS ENTERED INTO EVIDENCE PLTF PRAYS FOR JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT BERMUDEZ ONLY AND FOR RESTITUTION OF PREMISES ONLY AND THE COURT SO FINDS. PLTF WILL FILED A DISML AS TO DEFT MARTINEZ. PLTF EXH #1 IS WITHDRAWN AND RETURNED TO PLTF.
